name: Hot Wings[chicken]
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together melted butter, hot pepper sauce, and vinegar.
3. Dip each drumette in the mixture.
4. Arrange the drumettes in a single layer in a large baking pan.
5. Bake until the chicken is browned, about 30-40 minutes.
6. Sprinkle with paprika.
7. Serve with salad dressing and celery sticks.
